name: Seek Limited
analysis: SEK has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$13.7900, stop A$11.6275, target A$15.2500 (0.68:1) — then trail it.
